mapper.insert: insert into aiw_portfolio (biz_id, portfolio_no, owner_user_biz_id, portfolio_name, portfolio_type, base_currency, status, version, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, deleted_at) values (#{bizId}, #{portfolioNo}, #{ownerUserBizId}, #{portfolioName}, #{portfolioType}, #{baseCurrency}, #{status}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}) on duplicate key update portfolio_name = values(portfolio_name), base_currency = values(base_currency), status = values(status), version = values(version), updated_at = values(updated_at), updated_by = values(updated_by), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), deleted_at = values(deleted_at)
mapper.select: select * from aiw_portfolio where biz_id = #{bizId} and is_deleted = 0
